scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @zleap/agent build && pnpm --filter @zleap/host build && node scripts/dev-all.mjs
scripts.stop: pnpm --filter @zleap/agent build && pnpm --filter @zleap/host build && pnpm --filter @zleap-ai/cli build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js stop
scripts.dev:web: pnpm --filter @zleap/agent build && pnpm --filter @zleap/host build && node scripts/dev-web.mjs
scripts.dev:tasks: pnpm --filter @zleap/agent build && pnpm --filter @zleap/host build && node scripts/tasks-worker.mjs
scripts.dev:gateway: pnpm --filter @zleap/agent build && pnpm --filter @zleap/host build && node scripts/gateway.mjs
scripts.serve: pnpm --filter @zleap/agent build && pnpm --filter @zleap/host build && pnpm --filter @zleap-ai/cli build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js serve
scripts.pack:cli-npm: pnpm --filter @zleap-ai/cli... build && node scripts/prepare-cli-npm-package.mjs && node tests/check-cli-publish.mjs
scripts.tasks:worker: pnpm --filter @zleap/agent build && pnpm --filter @zleap/host build && node scripts/tasks-worker.mjs
scripts.gateway:worker: pnpm --filter @zleap/agent build && pnpm --filter @zleap/host build && node scripts/gateway.mjs
